infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: WERN needs access to your motion data to count steps and track your walking progress.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: WERN needs location access to track your walking route.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: WERN needs background location to continue counting steps when the app is in background.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: WERN needs background location to continue counting steps when the app is in background.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: WERN uses the camera so you can take a profile picture for your WERN account and capture photos to attach to walks and rewards (for example, a selfie after hitting your daily step goal).
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: WERN uses the microphone only when you record a short audio clip to attach to a walk note (for example, a voice memo about your route). It is not used otherwise.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: WERN accesses your photo library so you can choose an existing picture for your profile or attach a photo to a walk (for example, a snapshot from your route). Photos are only used in WERN and never uploaded without your action.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: WERN saves a photo to your library when you choose to export or share a WERN walk summary or reward card.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: WERN needs background location to continue counting steps when the app is in background.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: WERN needs background location to continue counting steps when the app is in background.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: WERN needs location access to track your walking progress.

plugins.motionPermission: WERN needs access to your motion sensors to accurately count your steps.
